title: Crispy Salty Canadian Penne Toast
description: A hearty, dairy‑free post‑workout dish that pairs al dente penne rigate with crisp toasted bread, seasoned with maple‑sweetened smoked paprika for a uniquely Canadian flavor.
instructions: Cook penne in a pot of salted boiling water until al dente (about 8 minutes), then drain and set aside.
While the pasta cooks, lay bread slices on a baking sheet and toast them in the oven for 5 minutes until golden and crisp.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, minced garlic, smoked paprika, sea salt, black pepper, nutritional yeast, and maple syrup to make the seasoning sauce.
Add the cooked pasta to the sauce and toss until the pasta is evenly coated.
Spread the seasoned pasta onto the toasted bread slices, squeezing a little extra sauce onto each one.
Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the bread edges are caramelized and the pasta is lightly crisped.
Remove from the oven, sprinkle with chopped parsley, let cool slightly, and serve warm.
